Hi, my name is Nicklas

I like to build things

I'm one of the founders of Webready, a development agency in Kalmar, Sweden.

Things I have built

As owner of a development agency I have built a lot of fun and cool projects together with clients. But since I find happiness to build things for myself again this is some of them.

FeedBackPack

SaaS-app for collecting feedback with screenshot from your customers. Specially good when you have static-sites with no backend such as JAMStack.

Dev
  • Next.js
  • Docker
  • Typescript
  • Tailwind CSS
https://feedbackpack.app

PR LOG

Everything you need to keep track of your PRs (personal records) in training. Optimized and build for where to use it - your mobile.

Dev
  • Next.js
  • NextAuth.js
  • PostgreSQL
  • Prisma
  • Typescript
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Docker
https://prlog.app

Snittränta

A comparison site for average interest rates between Swedish banks.

Dev
  • Gatsby
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Puppeteer
https://snittränta.se

Månadskollen

Copy and paste bank statement from Swedish banks and get a fast summary and overview of your finance.

Dev
  • Gatsby
  • Tailwind CSS
https://månadskollen.se

Odlingsguiden

A Swedish gardening guide with 50+ vegetables, filtered by growing zone and month. Helps you know what to sow, plant and harvest.

Dev
  • React
  • Vite
  • TypeScript
  • CSS Modules
https://lillabosgarden.se/odlingsguiden/

Minimalisera

A blog about minimalism. First project with Gatsby and Tailwind CSS.

Dev
  • Gatsby
  • Tailwind CSS
https://minimalisera.se
